chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 858 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.3858/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.3757/2025 (Ex./A) 4. For orders on CMA No.3758/2025 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case 12.06.2025 Mr. Muhammad Raza Soomro, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 5. At the very outset, learned Counsel for the petitioner submits that there are certain formal defects in the petition which ought to have been rectified. Therefore, he does not press this petition but seeks permission to file a fresh petition. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed along with the listed applications. However, the petitioner shall be at liberty to file a fresh petition, if so advised and permissible under the law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
